title: taraxacum lateritium
intro: Taraxacum lateritium, also known as the yellow dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and gallbladder issues, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum lateritium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum lateritium often include the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
